summary.shape_sentence: Opened weak, reversed hard off the early low, then spent the rest of RTH holding higher and grinding back toward the upper band into the close.

goat.note: Opening flush reversed sharply and expanded into the main upside repricing of the session.

red_circles.behavior: Clustered mainly from late morning into midday, marking repeated fade attempts under overhead resistance without breaking the day's bullish structure.

green_circles.behavior: Appeared at the opening washout and again on later pullbacks, acting as continuation supports on an up session.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Early supply near 23900-24000 was broken; upper supply near 24180-24255 was tested repeatedly and mostly respected into the close.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Opening demand near 23660-23720 held decisively; later demand around 24000-24120 was repeatedly defended.

time_markers.10am_blue: Strong upside expansion out of the open reversal, with early supply being reclaimed and cleared.
time_markers.12pm_red: Midday rotation below the morning peak; price held gains but stalled under upper resistance.
time_markers.2pm_green: Higher-low support held and the afternoon reclaim sequence started to rebuild.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Session ended near the upper end of range after a steady late grind higher.

takeaway: Bullish open-reversal trend day with defended demand after the early flush and a steady afternoon reclaim into the close.
